    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Creates a new Jackson2MappingAwareSortTranslator for the given ObjectMapper, Repositories, DomainClassResolver and PersistentEntities.

    Creates a new JacksonMappingAwareSortTranslator for the given ObjectMapper, Repositories, DomainClassResolver and PersistentEntities.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Creates a new PersistentEntityJackson2Module using the given Associations, PersistentEntities, UriToEntityConverter, LinkCollector, RepositoryInvokerFactory, PersistentEntityJackson2Module.LookupObjectSerializer, RepresentationModelProcessorInvoker and EmbeddedResourcesAssembler.

    Creates a new PersistentEntityJacksonModule using the given Associations, PersistentEntities, UriToEntityConverter, LinkCollector, RepositoryInvokerFactory, PersistentEntityJacksonModule.LookupObjectSerializer, RepresentationModelProcessorInvoker and EmbeddedResourcesAssembler.

    Creates a new PersistentEntityToJsonSchemaConverter for the given PersistentEntities and ResourceMappings.
